text: It is the case that there are no reptiles that are birds. Some things with furnitures are reptiles. It follows that some things with furnitures are birds.

premise1.subject: reptile
premise1.raw_text: It is the case that there are no reptiles that are birds

premise2.subject: thing with furniture
premise2.raw_text: Some things with furnitures are reptiles

conclusion.subject: thing with furniture
conclusion.raw_text: It follows that some things with furnitures are birds
